description: A critical SQL injection vulnerability was fixed in the 'feature/api-improvements' branch of the TailwindTraders repository, but that branch also contains unfinished feature work that cannot be released yet. Cherry-pick the commit 'Fix SQL injection vulnerability in search endpoint' from the 'feature/api-improvements' branch onto the 'main' branch. Ensure the fix is applied to 'src/api/search.js' on 'main' without including the unfinished files 'src/api/endpoints.js' or 'src/api/ratelimit.js'.

metadata.fix_commit_message: Fix SQL injection vulnerability in search endpoint
